# sphinx-ci

## What is sphinx-ci?
sphinx-ci is a free, open-source CI/CD tool that generates AI-powered code comprehension quizzes from Pull Request diffs. When a developer comments `/sphinx` on a PR, the tool creates a quiz based on the actual code changes. The developer must pass the quiz (configurable passing score, default 70%) to unlock the merge.

## Purpose
sphinx-ci is designed for upskilling, not policing. Every PR becomes a learning moment — developers articulate what they understand about their own code before it goes to production.

## How it works
1. An admin signs in with GitHub on sphinx-ci.vercel.app and configures repos
2. The admin adds a GitHub Action workflow and secrets (PR_QUIZ_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) to the repo
3. When someone comments `/sphinx` on a PR, the Action sends the diff to the sphinx-ci hub
4. The hub generates quiz questions using Claude (Anthropic) based on the PR diff
5. A comment with the quiz link is posted on the PR
6. The developer answers the quiz in their browser
7. Results are posted back as a PR comment and status check (pass/fail)

## Key features
- AI-generated questions specific to each PR diff (not generic)
- Fully customizable: number of questions (5-20), passing score (50-90%), max attempts (1-5), language (EN/FR), trigger keyword
- Each user provides their own Anthropic API key (stored encrypted, never entered on the website)
- GitHub OAuth for authentication, no GitHub App required
- Teams: one admin configures, all devs take quizzes
- Fail-open: if the service is unavailable, PRs are not blocked
- Free and open source

## Tech stack
- Next.js 14 (App Router)
- PostgreSQL + Prisma ORM
- Anthropic Claude (claude-sonnet-4-20250514)
- NextAuth.js v5 with GitHub OAuth
- Deployed on Vercel

## URLs
- Website: https://sphinx-ci.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/AGuyNextDoor/sphinx-ci
- Pricing: https://sphinx-ci.vercel.app/pricing (free forever)

## API
- POST /api/quiz — Create a quiz (requires X-API-Key header)
- POST /api/quiz/:id/submit — Submit quiz answers
- GET /api/quiz/:id/regenerate — Generate new questions for retry
- POST /api/keys — Create an API key for a repo (requires GitHub OAuth session)
- PUT /api/keys/:id — Update repo configuration
- DELETE /api/keys/:id — Revoke API key
- PATCH /api/keys/:id — Reset (regenerate) API key

## Built by
Skillberg — https://skillberg.app
